description_long: This is a stylized depiction of a young child with a large, bald head and a single tuft of hair on top. The child is wearing a sleeveless tank top and a pair of shorts, with sandals on their feet. The figure is posed with one arm raised in a friendly wave and the other hand resting on the hip, giving a playful and approachable appearance. The facial features are exaggerated, with large eyes, a wide smile, and prominent eyebrows, contributing to a cartoonish and cheerful look. The proportions are not realistic, with a larger head and smaller body, typical of animated or mascot characters. The surface appears smooth and slightly matte, with visible painted details for clothing and facial features.
description: A cartoonish child figure with a large head, waving one hand, dressed in a tank top, shorts, and sandals, with a single tuft of hair on top.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thin profile of the child, with the raised arm and facial features barely visible.
description_view_1: Front view displaying the child's smiling face, raised waving hand, and full outfit details.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, again showing the thin profile and the outstretched arm, with facial features partially visible.
description_view_3: Rear three-quarter view, showing the back of the head, the arm extended outward, and the back of the clothing and sandals.
attribute_hairstyle: bald with a single short topknot
attribute_posture: standing with one arm raised in a wave
